General.Name: Wereldhave NV
General.Description: Wereldhave N.V. contributes to a better everyday life for visitors and better business for tenants. A one-stop location for groceries, shopping, leisure, relaxation, sports, health, work and other daily needs " all supported by smart concepts and digital services. By investing sustainably to meet the needs of customers and local areas, we enrich communities, while caring for the environment, and have a positive effect on the way people live, work and shop. Wereldhave N.V. play a vital role in people's everyday lives in leading regional cities in the Netherlands, Belgium, Luxembourg and France.
